loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for run hours and availability, as specific runtime counters are not measured by this meter. Service interval and status are static defaults.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for run-hours and starts, as the meter does not log dedicated run-hours or start-count columns. Average load is derived from active power.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active and reactive energy for this month; MTBF and MTTR are not measured by this meter.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive energy history. Apparent energy is derived from active/reactive. Power factor is included as a secondary metric. The card's native 'Backup Readiness' schema is repurposed for energy breakdown.
